TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Judd_Apatow, title = Judd_Apatow, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Judd_Apatow} }

S.FORM: Judd Apatow kawas tay 1967, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 12, Judd Apatow, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Judd Apatow kawas tay 1967, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 12, Judd Apatow, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *u** apatow kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, *u** apatow, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
